chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 857 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 14-04-2025 None present for the petitioner Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. This petition is pending since 2017 without any progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
